candidates.name: Saksham Kushwaha
candidates.skills: Python, JavaScript, React.js, Node.js, MongoDB, Machine Learning, Data Analysis
candidates.resumeText:
Saksham Kushwaha   
Linkedin:  linkedin.com/in/saksham -kushwaha/  Email: sakshamsingh1304@gmail.com  
Github:  github.com/sakshamsingh1304   Mobile:  +91 6353179073  
PROJECTS   
    
 • OLA Price Prediction:           January 2025 – March 2025  
Built a machine learning model to predict Chh -OLA trip fares using trip parameters like distance, tolls,  
and payment methods.  
Tech:  Python, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit -learn, Random Forest, XGBoost, Flask, Git, Jupyter Notebook  
Key Highlights:  
• Processed and cleaned a dataset of 1.4M trips for accurate fare prediction.  
• Engineered key features from time, location, and ride attributes.  
• Compared multiple models, selecting Random Forest for the best performance.  
• Deployed a Flask API for real -time fare estimation.  
 
•  Spotify Music Data Analysis:                                                                                                                                August 2024 – November2024   
Developed a comprehensive data analysis project based on the Spotify 2023 dataset, utilizing Python libraries for data manipu lation,  
cleaning, and visualization. The project explored key trends, attributes, and performance of top tracks and artists.  
     Tech:  Python, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn  
     Key Highlights:  
• Data Cleaning:  Addressed missing values, inconsistent data types, and removed duplicates.  
• Data Transformation:  Processed and transformed data, including splitting artist names.  
• Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA):  Analyzed key trends in song features and artist popularity.  
• Visualizations:  Created histograms, violin plots, and heatmaps to showcase data distribution and correlations.  
• MERN Stack Notes App :                                                                                                                                        June 2024  – August 2024  
Developed a full -stack Notes application using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js). The app  allows  users  to create,  edit, delete,         
and view  notes  securely.  
     Tech:  MongoDB,  Node.js,  Express.js,  React.js,  JWT,  bcrypt,  Mongoose,  Git,  Netlify,  MongoDB  Atlas  
     Key Highlights:  
• Frontend:  React.js for building dynamic UI components for managing notes.  
• Backend:  Node.js & Express for handling API routes and CRUD operations for notes.  
• Security:  Implemented JWT for user authentication and bcrypt for secure password storage.  
• Deployment:  Deployed backend on Heroku, frontend on Netlify, and database on MongoDB Atlas.  
 
   SKILLS   
  • Languages :  P y t h o n , javascript    
 
  •  Frameworks : HTML and CSS, NodeJS, React, expressJS   
 
  •  Tools/Platforms : MySQL, MongoDB, tableau, Power BI   
 
  •  Soft Skills : Communication skills, Team Player, Adaptability   
 
  CERTIFICATES    
 
      
  Data Analysis and Visualization with Python - Coursera                                              
The Bits and Bytes of Computer Networkin g- Coursera  May  2025 – June 2025  
April 2024 – May 2024  
 
  Complete Full -Stack Development using MERN Stack - Cipher School  June 2024 – August  2024 
 
  ACHIEVEMENTS    
 
     
 • Participated in Hackathone:  January 2023  
 
   Participated in Hackathone  organized by Webathone   
 
 • Participated in MUN in School:  December 2021  
 
   Participated and got recognized at MUN.   
 
   
EDUCATION    
 
      
  • Lovely Professional University  Jalandhar, Punjab  
 
   Bachelor of Technology - Computer Science and Engineering; CGPA: 6.9           2022 -  2026  
 
  • Shree Vallabh Ashram International School  Valsad, Gujarat  
 
   Intermediate; Percentage: 65%  2021 -  2022  
 
`  • Shree Vallabh Ashram International School  Valsad, Gujarat  
 
  Matriculation; Percentage: 83%  2019 – 2020

Built a machine learning model to predict Chh-OLA trip fares using trip parameters like distance, tolls, 
and payment methods.

Key Highlights:
Processed and cleaned a dataset of 1.4M trips for accurate fare prediction.
Engineered key features from time, location, and ride attributes.
Compared multiple models, selecting Random Forest for the best performance.
Deployed a Flask API for real-time fare estimation.

Developed a comprehensive data analysis project based on the Spotify 2023 dataset, utilizing Python libraries for data manipulation, 
cleaning, and visualization. The project explored key trends, attributes, and performance of top tracks and artists.

Data Transformation: Processed and transformed data, including splitting artist names.

   SKILLS

candidates.name: Vinayak Purohit
candidates.resumeText:
VINAYAK PUROHIT

vinayakpurohit9589@gmail.com  ·  +91 9589100296  ·  LinkedIn  ·  GitHub  ·  Jalandhar, Punjab
EDUCATION
B.Tech, Computer Science — Data Science & Machine Learning	Aug 2022 – May 2026
Lovely Professional University	Jalandhar, Punjab
PROJECTS
Sales Performance Dashboard	Jan 2026 – Feb 2026
Analysed 12,000+ sales transactions across 15+ product categories using SQL to surface revenue trends, conversion gaps, and category-level performance insights
Resolved 1,200+ missing and inconsistent records through structured data cleaning and transformation in SQL and Excel, ensuring downstream analytical accuracy
Developed a Power BI dashboard with 10+ KPIs — revenue, conversion rate, and category share — automating monthly reporting and identifying top 3 categories driving 42% of total revenue
Technologies: SQL, MySQL, Power BI, Excel (PivotTables, VLOOKUP, VBA), DAX, KPI Tracking, Reporting Automation
Layoffs Dataset Analytics & Data Cleaning  ↗ GitHub	Jun 2025 – Jul 2025
Analysed 5,000+ global layoff records across 20+ industries using SQL window functions and CTEs, uncovering 3 sectors responsible for 55% of total layoffs
Eliminated 250+ duplicate records using ROW_NUMBER() and standardised 30+ industry/country fields through systematic data transformation for downstream integrity
Delivered structured trend report surfacing workforce insights across industries for stakeholder review
Technologies: SQL, MySQL, Window Functions, CTEs, Joins, Aggregations, Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA), Root Cause Analysis
Customer Behaviour Data Analytics  ↗ GitHub	Jan 2025 – Feb 2025
Processed 100,000+ transactions across 10,000+ customers using Python (Pandas) for end-to-end EDA, null handling, and feature transformation
Executed PostgreSQL queries with CTEs and window functions for revenue segmentation and statistical analysis across customer cohorts
Constructed a Power BI dashboard with 12+ KPIs on purchasing trends, enabling data-driven decisions for both business and non-technical stakeholders
Technologies: Python, Pandas, PostgreSQL, CTEs, Window Functions, Power BI, DAX, Statistical Analysis, Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages: Python, SQL, Java
Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, Query Optimization, Common Table Expressions (CTEs), Window Functions, Joins, Aggregations
Data Analysis: Data Cleaning, Data Transformation, Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA), Statistical Analysis, Root Cause Analysis, Trend Analysis, A/B Testing
Visualization: Power BI, Tableau, Dashboard Development, DAX, KPI Tracking, Reporting Automation
Excel: PivotTables, VLOOKUP, VBA, Power Query
Data Engineering: ETL Processes, Data Warehousing, Data Modelling, Data Pipeline Development
Cloud & Tools: AWS, Azure, Git, GitHub, Docker
CERTIFICATIONS
Generative AI — IIT Roorkee	Oct 2024
Machine Learning — IIT Roorkee	Sep 2024
Data Structures & Algorithms — GeeksforGeeks	Jun 2024 – Aug 2024
100 Days of Code — Python — Udemy	Jan 2024 – Apr 2024
LEADERSHIP & ACHIEVEMENTS
Led public relations for Youth Vibe — managed stakeholder communications for a 5-day event with 10,000+ attendees, coordinating press, social media, and on-ground teams across 3 departments
Placed in top ranks at university hackathon by designing and shipping a working data analytics prototype within a 24-hour constraint, beating 30+ competing teams
Directed a 12-member cross-functional team to plan and execute a university tech fest with 500+ participants, managing scheduling, logistics, and budget allocation
